findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 41 findings from 7 agents into 28 unique findings. Removed 13 duplicates. Identified 4 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): Conduct User Feedback Collection on Notification Features (score=3.381); North Star Metric: User Engagement (score=3.154); Strong Competitor Landscape Identified (score=3.129); Primary KPI: Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR) (score=3.129); Monitor Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR) (score=3.129)

top_priorities.title: Conduct User Feedback Collection on Notification Features

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 4 conflicts between agent findings. intake-001 vs feasibility-002: Privacy risks detected may hinder the implementation of notification features that rely on user data.; intake-002 vs competitive-003: Pricing risk identified could conflict with the recommendation to leverage pricing strategy to compete effectively.; metrics-004 vs metrics-006: A rising unsubscribe rate may indicate notification fatigue, conflicting with the recommendation to optimize notification timing.

evidence.excerpt: Privacy risks detected may hinder the implementation of notification features that rely on user data.
Pricing risk identified could conflict with the recommendation to leverage pricing strategy to compete effectively.
A rising unsubscribe rate may indicate notification fatigue, conflicting with the recommendation to optimize notification timing.
The notification delivery latency issue conflicts with the requirement to reduce latency below the SLO of 200ms.

conflicts.description: Privacy risks detected may hinder the implementation of notification features that rely on user data.
conflicts.resolution: Conduct a privacy impact assessment and ensure compliance with data protection regulations before proceeding with feature development.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing privacy concerns is essential to maintain user trust and comply with regulations, which may require adjustments to feature implementation.

conflicts.description: Pricing risk identified could conflict with the recommendation to leverage pricing strategy to compete effectively.
conflicts.resolution: Reassess pricing strategy to ensure it aligns with risk management while enhancing features to remain competitive.
conflicts.reasoning: Balancing competitive pricing with risk management is crucial to avoid undermining the product's market position.

conflicts.description: A rising unsubscribe rate may indicate notification fatigue, conflicting with the recommendation to optimize notification timing.
conflicts.resolution: Implement user segmentation to tailor notification strategies based on engagement levels and preferences to reduce unsubscribe rates.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing user fatigue through targeted strategies can improve engagement metrics while minimizing unsubscribe rates.

conflicts.description: The notification delivery latency issue conflicts with the requirement to reduce latency below the SLO of 200ms.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize architectural changes to address delivery latency issues before implementing new features that may exacerbate the problem.
conflicts.reasoning: Ensuring compliance with latency requirements is critical for user satisfaction and overall system performance.

summary: Consolidated 41 findings into 28 unique items. Removed 13 duplicates, resolved 4 conflicts. Top priority: Conduct User Feedback Collection on Notification Features.
